narrative.headline: ⚠ 3 security findings — review before other cleanup. First scan complete. 34 open findings across 3 dimensions.

actions.description: 3 orphaned findings — delete dead files or relocate with `desloppify move`
2 structural findings — decompose large files — extract logic into focused modules
1 dupes findings — extract shared utility or consolidate duplicates
6 dict_keys findings — fix dict key mismatches — dead writes are likely dead code, schema drift suggests a typo or missed rename
3 test_coverage findings — add tests for untested production modules — prioritize by import count
1 responsibility_cohesion findings — split modules with too many responsibilities — extract focused sub-modules
13 smells findings — inspect with `desloppify next` and fix manually
3 security findings — review and fix security findings — prioritize by severity
2 files need design review — run design review with dimension templates

strategy.hint: Work through actions in priority order. Rescan after each fix to track progress.
